title: VerificationReport
description: Payload for message_type=VerificationReport. Sent by Verifier → Overseer. Reports whether acceptance tests passed. Overseer MUST NACK if any failed check has no evidence — this prevents hallucinated failures.

verification_status.description: 'pass' moves run to COMPLETE (after Knowledge). 'fail' triggers Knowledge. 'blocked_requirements' routes back to REQUIREMENTS_GATHERING. 'deferred' = cannot verify yet (infrastructure not ready).

checks.description: One entry per acceptance test from GoalSpec. Overseer MUST NACK if any failed check has evidence=[].

id.description: Matches an id from GoalSpec.acceptance_tests (or a derived id).

result.description: 'defer' = check could not be run (infrastructure issue, not a build failure).

evidence.description: Log excerpts, file:line references, or screenshot refs proving the result. MUST be non-empty if result='fail'. Overseer NACKs empty evidence on failures.

summary.description: Human-readable overall conclusion. Must be factual, not evaluative ('looks good', 'nice' not allowed).

requirements_gaps.description: If verification_status='blocked_requirements', list the specific requirements that are missing.
